body.title: restart.flag: check at _drain_network entry, not just idle loop
body.result: main.py: restart.flag check added to _drain_network entry. Syntax OK. Committed+pushed 08c8afb7.
body.description: Add restart.flag check at top of _drain_network so a cc_send ping triggers restart even when idle loop is blocked. Fixes: Igor ignoring restart.flag when PROC_FLAG_ANOMALY prevents idle state.
